alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide prior to the in-gel digestion.
cleavage agent: by adding 5 μL 10 ng/μL trypsin or chymotrypsin in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate.
enrichment method: phosphopeptides enrichment using TiO2 Mag Sepharose®.
fragmentation method: collision-induced dissociation (CID) MS/MS product ion spectra.
instrument: ThermoFisher Scientific Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer.
ionization type: ionized using electrospray ionization (ESI) at negative mode.
reduction reagent: reduced with DTT and alkylated with iodoacetamide.
